title: OREGON SUMMER DAY CAMP - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND OREGON SUMMER DAY CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides day camps with safe, fun, and engaging activities including arts and crafts, nature and exploration, sports and recreation, and performing arts. Campers must provide their own sack lunch. 237 NE Broadway Street Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 10-14 with a diagnosed disability Hours: Camp sessions: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Office: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 222-8500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 228-5100 Main phone Main phone (503) 222-8500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Applications available on website. FEES: $350 per week or $80 per day and a $25 application fee; scholarships may be available DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - EASTERSEALS OREGON EMPLOYMENT - CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RESIDENTIAL SUMMER CAMP AT EVANS CREEK RETREAT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND
